titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in 213
GA 213
The New Testament
Das Neue Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (the IGNTP and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made. See further .

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John between 2010 and 2013.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. The original transcription guidelines can be found at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used are version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: Block marker moved at 9.8-9 by David Parker.
Two corrections turned into one at 5.37 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break at 9.33 corrected and ις changed to υς at 12.16 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break at 10.40 corrected by Rachel Kevern.
Word break at 10.10 corrected by Rachel Kevern.
Word break at 5.38 corrected by Rachel Kevern.
Word break at 18.22 corrected by Rachel Kevern.
Word break corrected and iota adscript removed at 13.11 by Rachel Kevern.
Verse break at 18.2-3 corrected, supplied letter added at 1.19, 2.9, 24, 4.45, 11.40, 14.15, 15.17, 18.11, 21, word break corrected at 4.53 transcription error corrected in 14.1 by David Parker.
Word break at 13.1 corrected by David Parker.
Iota adscripts removed by David Parker.
Converted from plain text by Catherine Smith using Python conversion scripts 1.0.

body.note: Status:G-A Number: 213Name of book transcribed: JohnFirst folio transcribed: 280rBase text used: TRns Transcribed by: Edgar EbojoTranscription begun: June 17, 2010Transcription finished: August 9, 2010 Does this manuscript contain (delete and complete as appropriate): Lectionary annotations - Yes Initials and other enlarged letters - Yes Diples (>) - No Obeloi (†) - No Other remarks: - Some folia are blurred due to ink seeping through the other page;- Iota adscript used;- With a number of abbreviations;- 19.6-22.0 has been written by another (later) hand and treated as a supplement, containing more lines to a page
